description_long: This imposing stone castle features a rectangular layout with four large cylindrical corner towers, each topped with conical gray roofs. The central structure rises above the outer walls, incorporating multiple smaller towers and turrets, also capped with pointed roofs. The main entrance is a prominent arched gateway set into the front wall, flanked by the two front towers. The walls are punctuated by small, evenly spaced windows and arrow slits, providing both defense and light. The castle sits on a grassy base, suggesting it is surrounded by open land. The overall design is reminiscent of classic medieval European fortresses, emphasizing defense and grandeur.
description: A large stone medieval castle with four cylindrical corner towers, conical gray roofs, and a central arched entrance, set on a grassy base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main arched entrance, flanked by two prominent cylindrical towers and the central keep rising behind.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back wall with small windows and the tops of the inner towers visible above the outer walls.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the symmetry of the towers and the crenellated walls, with multiple conical roofs visible.
description_view_3: Opposite rear view showing the back entrance area and the arrangement of towers and turrets from behind.
